channel.title: Sports
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Sports, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: 2026 NFL Offseason Buzz, Rumors: Longtime Browns TE David Njoku Leaving
item.description: The NFL offseason hasn't officially arrived yet, but 30 teams are already looking ahead to 2026. Here's the latest offseason buzz and rumors around th...

item.title: Ranking Top 20 NASCAR Prospects: Who's Got Next?
item.description: From Cory Heim and Jade Avedisian to Rajah Caruth and Keelan Harvick, here are the latest names on NASCAR's top 20 prospects list.

item.title: 2026 MLB Free Agent Signings, Trades: Braves Sign 2023 All-Star, Gold Glover
item.description: Keeping tabs on all of MLB's notable free agency signings, trades, and extensions ahead of the 2026 season.

item.title: NASCAR Power Rankings: Breaking Down Top 10 Entering Daytona 500
item.description: Here are the latest NASCAR power rankings as drivers prepare to take the track at Daytona.

item.title: 2027 Super Bowl Best Bet: Back Chargers to Have Seahawks-Like Season
item.description: Will Hill sees Justin Herbert following in the footsteps of Sam Darnold next season, overcoming his big-game demons and winning it all.

item.title: What Klint Kubiak hire means for Las Vegas: two-RB system, more 12-personnel and a potential Mendoza pairing
item.description: The Raiders hired Klint Kubiak. Here's what that means for Las Vegas, plus what's next in the offseason.

item.title: Super Bowl runner-up rings: What NFL players really think
item.description: Some conference championship rings fetch big bucks. Others wind up collecting dust on a closet shelf. Players share mixed opinions on the NFL's sparkl...

item.title: NASCAR descends on Daytona eager to move on from turbulent offseason, get back to racing
item.description: It was a heartbreaking offseason for much of NASCAR, and as the garage descends on Daytona, the stock car world is ready to refocus on racing.

item.title: Drake Maye lost his first Super Bowl. His future -- and the Patriots' -- remains bright
item.description: Drake Maye and the Patriots weren't able to do much in Super Bowl LX, but their future might still be bright.

item.title: 10 teams, 12 quarterbacks, no great options: Sorting the lackluster NFL quarterback market
item.description: There are no surefire free agent QBs available this March, and the draft class has only one first-round lock. So what now for teams that might need a ...
